显示 HN：Contrapunk – 来自吉他输入的实时对位和声，Rust

Show HN: Contrapunk – Real-time counterpoint harmony from guitar input, in Rust

contrapunk.com 作者 waveywaves 分数 32 评论 5 2026/04/05 08:40
打开 HN 原帖 打开原始文章

中文摘要

  1. 实时 MIDI 和声发生器和吉他到 MIDI 转换器。正确的对位规则。低于 10 毫秒的延迟。内置 Rust。自由的。没有登录。浏览器可在 Chrome 中与任何 MIDI 控制器配合使用。带吉他的 CONTRAPUNK 🎹 和声引擎 8 种和声模式，具有真正的对位规则。帕莱斯特里纳，巴赫，爵士乐，免费。 28 种缩放模式。确定性的声音。 🎸 吉他输入 插入你的吉他。实时音调检测、起始跟踪、自动校准。弹吉他，听对位法。 ⚡ SUB-10MS 延迟 单周期检测、2 帧投票、128 个样本缓冲区。速度足够快，适合现场表演。 🌐 通过 Tauri 随处运行本机桌面。通过 WebAssembly 的浏览器。工作室的服务器模式。到处都是相同的 Rust 核心。 🎼 声音引导平行五度拒绝。语音交叉预防。间距规则。几个世纪的音乐理论，用代码表达。 🔓 开源 MIT 许可。对位规则是人类几个世纪的知识。每个音乐家都应该能够接触到它们。

Original Summary

  1. Real-time MIDI harmony generator and guitar-to-MIDI converter. Proper counterpoint rules. Sub-10ms latency. Built in Rust. Free. No login. Browser works in Chrome with any MIDI controller. CONTRAPUNK WITH A GUITAR 🎹 HARMONY ENGINE 8 harmony modes with real counterpoint rules. Palestrina, Bach, Jazz, Free. 28 scale modes. Deterministic voicing. 🎸 GUITAR INPUT Plug in your guitar. Real-time pitch detection, onset tracking, auto-calibration. Play guitar, hear counterpoint. ⚡ SUB-10MS LATENCY Single-cycle detection, 2-frame voting, 128-sample buffers. Fast enough for live performance. 🌐 RUNS EVERYWHERE Native desktop via Tauri. Browser via WebAssembly. Server mode for studios. Same Rust core everywhere. 🎼 VOICE LEADING Parallel fifths rejection. Voice crossing prevention. Spacing rules. Centuries of music theory, in code. 🔓 OPEN SOURCE MIT licensed. Counterpoint rules are centuries of human knowledge. They should be accessible to every musician.

评论（默认中文）

waveywaves 2026/04/05 08:45
嗨 HN，我制作了 Contrapunk 因为我想弹吉他并聆听 实时生成的对位和声。它从吉他、MIDI 播放器或计算机键盘获取音频，并生成遵循对位规则的和声以生成和声。您可以选择您想要即兴演奏/演奏的音调、声音主导风格以及您想要演奏和声的哪一部分。

macOS DMG： https://github.com/contrapunk-audio/contrapunk/releases/tag/...

来源： https://github.com/contrapunk-audio/contrapunk （如果有任何问题，请打开）

希望获得有关 DSP 方法和和声算法的反馈。我还在考虑训练 ML 模型，以实现更好的实时吉他到 midi 检测。我相信这需要一些时间。

Hi HN, I built Contrapunk because I wanted to play guitar and hear counterpoint harmonies generated in real-time. It takes audio from your guitar, MIDI player or your computer keyboard and generates harmony voices that follow counterpoint rules to generate harmonies. You can choose the key you would like to improvise/play in and the voice leading style and which part of the harmony you would like to play as, as well.

macOS DMG: https://github.com/contrapunk-audio/contrapunk/releases/tag/...

Source: https://github.com/contrapunk-audio/contrapunk (do open any issues if you have any)

Would love feedback on the DSP approach and the harmony algorithms. I am also looking at training a ML model for better realtime guitar to midi detection. I believe that will take some time.

在 HN 中查看
Slow_Hand 2026/04/05 13:32
很酷的主意！

如果您愿意的话，我对功能有一些想法：

1. 能够指定您“演奏”的声音在声部中的位置：作为低音音符、作为内部声音或作为顶线。

2.每个生成的声音有第一类、第二类、第三类、华丽等对位选项。例如：您演奏一个音符，而上声部为您的每个音符演奏两个音符，等等。

3. 如果您想获得真正的乐趣，请让生成的声音执行您所演奏的音符的标准。

Cool idea!

I've got a few thoughts for features, if you're open to them:

1. Ability to specify where your "played" voice resides in the voicing: As the bass note, as an inner voice, or as the top line.

2. Options for first species, second species, third, florid, etc counterpoint for each of the generated voices. Ex: You play a single note and the upper voice plays two notes for every one of yours, etc, etc.

3. If you want to get real fancy, make the generated voices perform a canon of your played notes.

在 HN 中查看
chrisweekly 2026/04/05 11:07
“弹吉他时”中的“实时”有一些相当具有挑战性的延迟要求。即使您的解决方案是最佳的，硬件规格也将发挥重要作用。如果你已经解决了这个问题，我真的很感兴趣。
"Realtime" as in "while playing guitar" has some pretty challenging latency requirements. Even if your solution is optimal, hardware specs will play a meaningful role. I'd be really interested if you've solved for this e2e.
在 HN 中查看
marssaxman 2026/04/05 10:23
多么酷的主意啊。 我现在没有能够运行此功能的音乐设置 - 也许需要几个月 - 但如果您要发布一些示例录音，我很乐意听它们。

如何生成伴奏音符的力度值？

鉴于您已经有一个音高跟踪器，添加按键检测可能会很有趣；只需开始演奏，而不是告诉机器您所在的琴键，它就会在它明白后立即开始演奏。

What a cool idea. I don't have a music setup capable of running this right now - perhaps in a couple of months - but if you were to post some sample recordings, I'd gladly listen to them.

How do you generate velocity values for the accompaniment notes?

Given that you already have a pitch tracker, it could be interesting to add key detection; just start playing, instead of telling the machine what key you're in, and it starts following along as soon as it catches on.

Wow that's is really cool! Thanks for sharing! I will definitely take a look
